name: Iso11783OPSetNumericValue
title: Iso11783OPSetNumericValue
syntax: long Iso11783OPSetNumericValue( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, long numericValue );
long Iso11783OPSetNumericValue( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, long numericValue, long options );
description: The function sets the numerical value of an object. The object must exist in the object pool and must support a numerical value. If the Object Pool API is active, a Change Numeric Value command is sent to the Virtual Terminal. This can be suppress with Bit 0 in options.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)

parameters.name: objectID
parameters.description: Object ID of the object that has an updated value

parameters.name: numericValue
parameters.description: New value within the value range of the object

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: OptionsBit 0 = 1 Suppress Change Numeric Value command

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
